title: Story Script
description: A fully developed narrative script with character depth, subtext-aware dialogue, layered conflict, and structural quality markers — the output of the story-factory pipeline's develop stage.

source_seed_id.description: Links back to the story_seed.seed_id that this script was developed from

hook.description: Opening hook — the first thing the audience sees/reads

pattern.description: Story pattern name (e.g. 身份反转, 误会连环, 日常英雄)

ending.description: Ending design per Snyder contrast + 4 resolution types + manga page-turn

closing_image_hint.description: Snyder closing image that contrasts with opening

page_turn_hook.description: Manga technique: 右页最后一格的悬念设计

characters.description: Character registry with full Egri 3D depth model

role.description: Archetype label (e.g. 妈妈, 打工人)

physiological.description: Egri dimension 1: age, body, appearance, health

sociological.description: Egri dimension 2: class, job, education, family, religion

psychological.description: Egri dimension 3: temperament, beliefs, complexes, values

sacred_flaw.description: Storr: deeply flawed but sacredly held worldview (trauma → false conclusion → rigid belief)

trauma_origin.description: Root cause of the sacred flaw

desire_need.description: Truby: internal growth requirement — must differ from desire_want

opponent_mirror.description: What the character's opponent reflects about their hidden fears

action_under_pressure.description: McKee: how this character acts when cornered

archetype_source.description: Which character_archetypes entry from story_seed this was developed from

beat_name.description: From story_seed beats (HOOK, BUILD, CONFRONT, REVEAL, RESOLVE)

scene_description.description: 1-2 paragraphs of prose describing what happens in this scene

characters_present.description: character_ids of characters appearing in this scene

conflict_deep.description: Level 3: value/identity contradiction (freedom vs security, self vs group)

emotional_polarity_start.description: McKee: emotional state at scene start

emotional_polarity_end.description: McKee: emotional state at scene end — must differ from start

value_change.description: McKee: what value changed in this scene (e.g. Hope → Despair, Ignorance → Knowledge)

dialogue.description: Optional dialogue lines for this scene

surface_text.description: Words spoken aloud — mobile-optimized (≤15 Chinese chars)

subtext_meaning.description: Actual meaning beneath the surface — must differ from surface_text

mobile_optimized.description: Whether surface_text fits within mobile constraints

enum: use action instead of emotion words
subtext_rule_applied.description: Which McKee subtext rule this line applies

shot_hint.description: Shot size and angle suggestion from visual-grammar (ELS/LS/MS/CU/ECU + angle)

breathing_mode.description: Short-form breathing rhythm: inhale (tension build), hold (suspense peak), exhale (release)

therefore_but_chain.description: Causal/contrastive connections between every adjacent scene pair — never 'and then'

explanation.description: How the connection works narratively — must describe causal or contrastive logic

has_deep_conflict.description: At least one scene reaches deep (value/identity) level

escalation_pattern.description: Egri: conflict should rise, not stay static or jump

deepest_scene.description: Scene number where conflict reaches deepest level

has_cycle.description: Scene sequence contains inhale → hold → exhale cycle

max_consecutive_same_mode.description: Max consecutive scenes with same breathing mode (should be ≤2)

review_findings.description: Findings from the review stage (populated after review)
